channel.title: Ai on The Daily Thrum
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on The Daily Thrum

item.title: Australia First Country In Southern Hemisphere To Host 3km-Tall Cubical Data Centre
item.description:
NARRABRI — Australia has become the first country in the Southern Hemisphere to approve construction of a three-kilometre-tall cubical data centre, a structure expected to dominate the skyline and local weather systems.

The facility, known as TETRYAX-3000, will be built in regional New South Wales after similar structures were successfully deployed across North America, Western Europe, China, South Korea and Japan.

Government officials said the project would create thousands of jobs and position Australia at the forefront of the global artificial intelligence economy.
